description_long: This is a large, two-story brick house with a complex roofline featuring both gable and flat sections. The front facade is adorned with a covered porch supported by columns, decorative trim, and a prominent entryway. Multiple bay windows and circular windows add architectural interest, while balconies and wrought-iron railings enhance the upper level. The rear of the house opens to a spacious patio area with a swimming pool, surrounded by fencing and outdoor seating. Mature trees and landscaping elements are present on the property, providing shade and visual appeal. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, with a focus on symmetry and outdoor living spaces.
description: A large, two-story brick house with a complex roofline, covered porch, balconies, and a backyard pool, surrounded by mature landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with columns, covered porch, and decorative windows, flanked by trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the circular window, upper balcony with wrought-iron railing, and partial view of the pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive patio, swimming pool, and outdoor seating area, with brick walls and balcony above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat brick wall, turret-like roof feature, and additional landscaping.
attribute_architectural_style: Transitional (mix of Colonial and Modern elements)
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with bay and circular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent covered porch with columns, decorative trim, and a central door flanked by windows
